Yuki Quincewood is the founder of Orchardbyte Labs. Yuki pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

Yuki Pemberlake is the founder of Frostpetal Systems. Yuki wants a technical co-founder intro before committing.

turns.text: Ping Yuki about the offsite agenda.
Sorry — I meant Yuki Quincewood, the Orchardbyte Labs founder.
